name: Frosted Scotch Shortbread
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Evaporated Milk or Heavy Cream
recipeInstructions:
Cream butter, salt and sugar together. Mix in vanilla extract. Add flour and mix well. Mixture will be dry. Roll into small balls the size of a walnut. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes. Do not brown. Cool completely before frosting.
Frosting: Melt butter and chocolate in a saucepan over medium heat. Add sugar and cream. Boil for 1 minute, then remove from heat. Stir until thick enough to stick to the cookie. Dip the top of each cooled cookie into frosting and return to the cookie sheet or wire rack to set until frosting is firm. If frosting gets too hard to dip into, add a few drops of cream.
